VDI7_1994_Dea4_Tab1; Young's modulus and Poisson's ratio: Dubbel
T.E. Springer, M.S. Wilson, S. Gottesfeld, J. Electrochem. Soc. 140, 3513, 1993

Values are tabulated in intervalls of 10 Kelvin or smaller.

The approximation equation of *nsrds* constists of three (3) parts from i.(273.16k - 333.15k) ii. (333.15k - 403.15k)
iii. (403.15k - 647.13k). Data by one polynomial equation which fits the data over the desired range from the melting temperature up to the critical temperature.
